name: aria-marketplace
description: Marketplace for the Aria plugin — a human-in-the-loop development workflow for Claude Code

plugins.name: aria
plugins.description: Human-in-the-loop development workflow: design, plan, execute stepwise with checkpoints, regression baselines, code review, and post-implementation cleanup

plugins.name: aria-ops
plugins.description: Release operations toolkit: commit+push, changelog generation, PR merge+cleanup, and full release workflow with version bump and tagging

plugins.name: aria-testing
plugins.description: Test validation toolkit: manual QA checklists from release diffs (testplan), and autonomous E2E execution from feature-branch diffs via a browser MCP (e2e)
